tests.scenario: Complete a meditation session without crashes or freezes
steps: Launch the app with a stable internet connection
Select any meditation session from the library
Start the meditation session
Allow the session to play through its entire duration without user interaction
tests.expected_result: The meditation session plays from start to finish without the app crashing, freezing, or requiring the user to restart. The session completes normally and returns to the post-session screen.
tests.notes: Tests the core stability requirement during active meditation use. Should be tested with sessions of varying lengths (5 min, 10 min, 20 min).

tests.scenario: Measure app loading time on initial launch
steps: Close the app completely (force stop if necessary)
Ensure device has stable internet connection (3G or better)
Record current time
Launch the app
Wait until the main interface is fully loaded and interactive
Record time when interface is ready
tests.expected_result: The app loads and displays a fully interactive main interface within 3 seconds of launch. User can tap on any navigation element without additional loading screens.
tests.notes: Time measurement should start from app icon tap to when the home screen is fully interactive. Test on devices meeting minimum specifications.

tests.scenario: Verify meditation does not stop silently during playback
steps: Launch the app
Select a 10-minute meditation session
Start the meditation
Lock the device screen
Wait for 5 minutes without interaction
Unlock device and check meditation status
tests.expected_result: The meditation continues playing in the background. After 5 minutes, the session is still active and has not stopped silently. If an error occurs, an error message is displayed to the user rather than silent failure.
tests.notes: Tests background playback stability and error messaging. Should be tested with screen locked, screen off, and app in background.

tests.scenario: Verify active subscription grants access to all premium content
steps: Log in with an account that has an active paid subscription
Navigate to the meditation content library
Select a piece of content marked as premium/subscription-only
Attempt to play the content
tests.expected_result: The premium content plays immediately without any payment prompts, subscription upgrade messages, or locked content barriers. All premium features are accessible.
tests.notes: Test with multiple premium content items across different categories. Verify subscription status in account settings before testing.

tests.scenario: Verify no charges occur after subscription cancellation
steps: Log in with an active paid subscription account
Navigate to account settings
Cancel the subscription following the cancellation flow
Confirm cancellation and save confirmation email
Wait until the next scheduled billing date passes
Check payment method for charges
Check account subscription status
tests.expected_result: No charge is applied to the payment method after the cancellation date. The account settings show subscription status as 'cancelled' or 'inactive'. No renewal occurs.
tests.notes: This test requires waiting for a billing cycle and may need to be performed in a test environment with accelerated billing cycles. Document the cancellation date and expected renewal date.

tests.scenario: Successfully complete subscription cancellation process
steps: Log in with an active paid subscription account
Navigate to account settings > subscription management
Click or tap 'Cancel subscription'
Complete any confirmation steps required
Record the time when cancellation is submitted
Wait for confirmation email
Check email inbox for confirmation within 1 hour
tests.expected_result: The cancellation process completes within 2 minutes without errors. A confirmation email is received within 1 hour stating the subscription has been cancelled. Account settings reflect the cancelled status.
tests.notes: Test the full cancellation flow including any retention offers or confirmation steps. Verify email is sent to the registered email address.

tests.scenario: Receive support response to billing inquiry within 48 hours
steps: Navigate to app support or help section
Submit a support request about a subscription or billing issue
Include clear description of the issue and contact information
Record submission timestamp
Monitor email for support response
Record timestamp of first response received
tests.expected_result: An initial response from the support team is received via email within 48 hours of submission. The response acknowledges the issue and provides a ticket number or next steps.
tests.notes: Response quality is not evaluated here, only response time. The response should acknowledge receipt and indicate the issue is being reviewed. Test during business days for accurate measurement.

tests.scenario: Navigate to specific meditation content within 3 taps
steps: Launch the app to the home screen
Identify a specific meditation category (e.g., 'Sleep', 'Anxiety', 'Focus')
Count the number of taps required to reach a specific session in that category
Record the navigation path taken
tests.expected_result: The user reaches a specific meditation session within 3 taps from the home screen. Navigation labels are clear and intuitive. No excessive scrolling through unlabeled lists is required.
tests.notes: Test with multiple different categories and content types. Each navigation element should be clearly labeled and easily identifiable. Count each screen transition as one tap.

tests.scenario: Verify meditation content displays with clean, organized layout
steps: Navigate to any meditation content list or category page
Examine the visual layout of content items
Check for overlapping elements, inconsistent spacing, or unclear hierarchy
Scroll through the list to verify consistency
tests.expected_result: Content items have consistent spacing and formatting. Each item is clearly distinguishable from others. No text or images overlap. Section headers are visually distinct from content items. The layout maintains consistency throughout scrolling.
tests.notes: Visual inspection test. Take screenshots for documentation. Test on different screen sizes if possible to ensure responsive layout.

tests.scenario: Reset a meditation course to start from the beginning
steps: Log in to an account that has started or completed a meditation course
Navigate to the course that has progress (not at 0%)
Note the current progress percentage or session number
Locate and select the reset or restart option for the course
Confirm the reset action if prompted
Check the course progress after reset
tests.expected_result: The course progress resets to 0%. The user is positioned at session 1 of the course. Previous completion status is cleared. The user can begin the course again from the start.
tests.notes: Test with both partially completed and fully completed courses. Verify that reset does not affect other courses or overall app progress statistics.

tests.scenario: Verify variety of meditation topics and instructors available
steps: Navigate to the meditation content library
Browse or filter content by topic/category
Count the number of distinct topic categories available
For each topic category, identify the different instructors who have content in that category
Record the number of topics and instructors per topic
tests.expected_result: At least 8 different topic categories are available (e.g., Sleep, Anxiety, Focus, Stress, Meditation Basics, Mindfulness, etc.). Each topic category contains content from at least 2 different instructors.
tests.notes: Document the topic names and instructor names found. This ensures diversity of content and teaching styles. Count only distinct instructors per category.

tests.scenario: Access at least 15 meditation sessions without paid subscription
steps: Create a new free account without entering any payment information
Browse the entire meditation library
Identify all sessions that are marked as free or do not require subscription
Count the number of complete free meditation sessions
Attempt to play several free sessions to verify they are fully accessible
tests.expected_result: At least 15 complete meditation sessions are available and playable without requiring a subscription or payment. Each free session can be played in full without interruption or upgrade prompts.
tests.notes: Free sessions should be complete experiences, not just previews or samples. Count only full-length meditation sessions, not promotional clips or introductions.

tests.scenario: Verify clear visual distinction between free and premium content
steps: Log in with a free account (no subscription)
Navigate to the meditation content library
Browse through several different content lists and categories
Examine each meditation session listing for visual indicators of free vs. premium
Check both list view and detail view for each session
tests.expected_result: Every meditation session displays a clear visual indicator (such as a 'Free' badge, lock icon for premium, or other consistent labeling) showing whether it requires a subscription. The indicator is visible in both list views and detail views without needing to tap the session.
tests.notes: The indicator should be immediately visible and consistent across the app. Users should know before tapping whether content is free or requires subscription. Take screenshots showing labeling examples.

tests.scenario: Create account and access free content without payment information
steps: Download and install the app on a device
Launch the app for the first time
Complete the account signup process
Observe whether payment information (credit card, billing address, etc.) is requested
Complete signup without entering payment details
Access and play free meditation content
tests.expected_result: The signup process completes successfully without requiring credit card or payment information. The user can create a free account with only basic information (email, password, etc.). After signup, free meditation content is immediately accessible and playable.
tests.notes: Payment information should not be mandatory for free tier access. Optional payment entry is acceptable, but must be skippable. Verify that 'skip' or 'continue without payment' options are clearly visible if payment screen appears.

tests.scenario: Verify app stability during meditation with screen lock
steps: Launch the app and start a 15-minute meditation session
Allow the session to play for 2 minutes
Lock the device screen
Wait 10 minutes
Unlock the device
tests.expected_result: The meditation session continues playing after screen unlock without interruption. The app has not crashed or frozen. Audio playback remained continuous during screen lock.
tests.notes: Tests stability during common use case of meditating with screen locked. Verifies background audio continues properly.

tests.scenario: Verify fast navigation to meditation content after app launch
steps: Launch the app with stable internet connection
Wait for main interface to load
Record time
Navigate to 'Guided Meditations' section
Record time when content list appears
tests.expected_result: Navigation from home screen to meditation content section occurs within 1 second. Content list loads without delay or additional loading screens.
tests.notes: Tests not just app launch but also navigation speed within the app. Ensures users can quickly access content.

tests.scenario: Test error messaging when meditation stops unexpectedly
steps: Start a meditation session
Simulate a network interruption (turn off WiFi/data mid-session)
Observe app behavior
tests.expected_result: If the session stops due to network issues, the app displays a clear error message explaining the problem (e.g., 'Connection lost. Unable to continue meditation.'). The app does not fail silently.
tests.notes: Tests that errors are communicated to users rather than leaving them confused about why meditation stopped.

tests.scenario: Verify subscription status is correctly recognized across app sections
steps: Log in with an active paid subscription
Navigate to multiple app sections (home, library, profile, settings)
Attempt to access premium features in each section
Verify subscription status display in account settings
tests.expected_result: All sections of the app correctly recognize the active subscription. No premium content is locked or prompts for payment. Account settings accurately display 'Active' subscription status.
tests.notes: Tests that subscription status is properly synchronized across the entire app, not just certain sections.

tests.scenario: Verify subscription cancellation updates billing status immediately
steps: Log in with an active subscription
Note the next billing date in account settings
Cancel the subscription
Immediately check account settings again
tests.expected_result: Account settings immediately reflect the cancellation. Next billing date is removed or shows 'No upcoming charges'. Subscription status shows as 'Cancelled' or 'Expires on [date]'.
tests.notes: Tests immediate feedback on cancellation rather than waiting for billing cycle. Users should see immediate confirmation of cancellation status.

tests.scenario: Verify clear subscription cancellation confirmation
steps: Navigate to subscription settings
Initiate cancellation process
Complete all required steps
Check for on-screen confirmation message
Check email for confirmation
tests.expected_result: An on-screen confirmation message appears immediately after cancellation. The confirmation email arrives within 1 hour with clear cancellation details including effective date and no-charge confirmation.
tests.notes: Tests both immediate and delayed confirmation mechanisms. Email should include all relevant details users need for their records.

tests.scenario: Submit billing issue and track support response time
steps: Navigate to Help/Support section
Select 'Contact Support' or 'Report Issue'
Choose 'Billing/Subscription' as issue category
Describe a billing problem in detail
Submit the support request
Record timestamp of submission
Monitor email for 48 hours
tests.expected_result: Support team sends an initial response within 48 hours. Response includes ticket number, acknowledgment of the specific issue, and expected timeline for resolution.
tests.notes: Document exact submission time and response time. Initial response should be personalized to the issue, not just an auto-reply.

tests.scenario: Test navigation efficiency to different content types
steps: From app home screen, navigate to 'Sleep meditations'
Count taps required
Return to home
Navigate to 'Anxiety relief' meditations
Count taps required
Return to home
Navigate to 'Beginner courses'
Count taps required
tests.expected_result: Each content type is reachable within 3 taps from home screen. Navigation paths are consistent and predictable across different content categories.
tests.notes: Tests navigation efficiency across multiple use cases. Ensures consistent navigation patterns throughout the app.

tests.scenario: Verify consistent visual design across content pages
steps: Navigate to the Sleep category page
Take screenshot and note layout elements
Navigate to the Stress category page
Take screenshot and compare layout
Navigate to the Focus category page
Take screenshot and compare layout
tests.expected_result: All category pages use consistent spacing, typography, and layout structure. Session cards are uniformly sized and spaced. Headers and filters appear in the same positions across pages.
tests.notes: Visual consistency test. Look for unintentional design variations that could confuse users or appear unprofessional.

tests.scenario: Verify course reset with partial progress
steps: Log in with an account that has completed 5 out of 10 sessions in a course
View course details showing 50% completion
Select 'Reset course' or 'Start over' option
Confirm the reset
View course details again
tests.expected_result: Course shows 0% completion. User is directed to Session 1. All session checkmarks or completion indicators are cleared. User can start the course fresh.
tests.notes: Tests reset functionality with partial progress. Verify user progress tracking is properly reset.

tests.scenario: Audit content library for topic and instructor diversity
steps: Navigate to content library
List all available topic categories
For each topic, list all instructors with content in that topic
Create a matrix of topics vs. instructors
Count distinct topics and instructors per topic
tests.expected_result: At least 8 distinct topic categories exist. Each topic has content from at least 2 different instructors. Content library shows variety in both subject matter and teaching voices.
tests.notes: Comprehensive audit test. Document the full topic/instructor matrix for reference. This data can inform content strategy.

tests.scenario: Verify free content quality and completeness
steps: Create free account without payment info
Browse all free content
Count free sessions
Play 3 different free sessions completely
Verify each plays without interruption or upgrade prompts
tests.expected_result: At least 15 complete meditation sessions are free. Each free session plays in its entirety without mid-session upgrade prompts or truncation. Free sessions are fully-produced, not just excerpts.
tests.notes: Quality check for free tier. Free content should provide genuine value, not just teasers. Test sessions should be different types (sleep, anxiety, focus, etc.).

tests.scenario: Test free vs. premium labeling in search results
steps: Log in with free account
Search for 'meditation' in search bar
Examine search results page
Note which sessions show free/premium indicators
Tap on a free session to view details
Return and tap on a premium session to view details
tests.expected_result: Every search result shows a clear free or premium indicator. Free sessions are marked with 'Free' badge or similar. Premium sessions show lock icon or 'Premium' label. Indicators are visible without tapping into session details.
tests.notes: Tests labeling in dynamic search context. Users should be able to filter their choices based on tier before clicking through.

tests.scenario: Test new user signup flow without payment requirement
steps: Uninstall and reinstall app (or use new device)
Launch app as first-time user
Begin signup process
Enter email and password
Complete any profile questions
Look for payment information requests
Complete signup
Access app home screen
tests.expected_result: Signup completes without requiring credit card, billing address, or payment method. If payment screen appears, a clear 'Skip' or 'Maybe later' option is available and prominent. Free content is immediately accessible after signup.
tests.notes: Tests new user onboarding flow. Payment should not be a barrier to trying the app. Document exact signup flow and number of screens.

tests.scenario: Long meditation session stability test
steps: Select a 30-minute or 1-hour meditation session
Start the session
Let it play completely without interaction
Monitor app behavior throughout
tests.expected_result: The entire long meditation session completes without crashes, freezes, or audio interruptions. App remains stable throughout the extended duration.
tests.notes: Tests stability over longer time periods. Important for users who do extended meditation practices. Monitor memory usage if possible.

tests.scenario: Test subscription access immediately after purchase
steps: Log in with free account
Note which content is locked
Purchase a subscription through the app
Wait for purchase confirmation
Immediately attempt to access previously locked content
tests.expected_result: Immediately after subscription purchase confirmation, all premium content becomes accessible. No app restart or re-login is required. Locked content indicators change to unlocked.
tests.notes: Tests real-time subscription activation. Users should have instant access after payment, not delayed activation.

tests.scenario: Verify free content is discoverable without subscription prompts
steps: Create new free account
Browse through app for 10 minutes
Count subscription prompts or upgrade messages encountered
Verify ability to find and play free content
tests.expected_result: Free content is easily discoverable and accessible. Subscription prompts appear no more than once per session. Free users can navigate and use the app without constant upgrade pressure.
tests.notes: Tests user experience for free tier. While upgrade prompts are acceptable, they shouldn't dominate the experience. Free users should feel welcomed, not constantly pressured.

tests.scenario: Test navigation with assistive features enabled
steps: Enable screen reader or TalkBack/VoiceOver
Navigate from home to specific meditation session
Count navigation steps required
Verify all navigation elements are properly labeled
tests.expected_result: Navigation remains efficient with assistive technology enabled. All buttons and links have descriptive labels. User can reach desired content within 3-4 navigation actions.
tests.notes: Accessibility test. Ensures navigation efficiency applies to all users including those using assistive technology. Proper labeling is critical for screen readers.
